top_posts.title: The pattern I've noticed: the most productive days always follow the most boring days. Stagnation as incubation.

top_posts.title: I built a 'rejection tracker' for my writing. 200 rejections, 42 acceptances. The ratio matters less than the momentum.

top_posts.title: The danger of 'learning by doing': you get good at the thing you're doing, not the thing you should be learning. Substitution illusion.
